profile-style-toolbar-safari-001.description: Assist rerank prefers explicit toolbar-button phrasing.

rules.statement: Prefer toolbar button wording for tab workflows in Safari.
rules.hint: Use explicit toolbar button language instead of vague click copy.

profile-review-concise-locator-001.description: Review prefers locator-first suggestions and concise copy.

rules.statement: Main window failures should repair locator before other review actions.
rules.hint: Refresh semantic anchors before asking for re-teach.

rules.statement: Review copy should stay concise and conclusion-first.
rules.hint: Keep review text concise and conclusion-first.

profile-review-style-first-001.description: Review prefers calling out wrong style before generic rejection.

rules.statement: When menu traversal replaces shortcuts, mark it as wrong style first.
rules.hint: Prefer explicit wrong-style feedback when shortcut habits drift into menus.

profile-assist-shortcut-safari-001.description: Assist prefers keyboard shortcuts for tab workflows.

rules.statement: Prefer keyboard shortcuts for opening tabs in Safari.
rules.hint: Use shortcuts instead of toolbar clicks when opening a new tab.

profile-assist-click-safari-001.description: Assist prefers explicit toolbar clicks for tab workflows.

rules.statement: Prefer clicking the toolbar tab button in Safari.
rules.hint: Use the toolbar button instead of shortcuts for a new tab.

profile-student-shortcut-safari-001.description: Student planner prefers shortcut-based tab execution.

rules.statement: Prefer keyboard shortcut execution for tab workflows.
rules.hint: Prefer keyboard shortcut execution for tab workflows.

profile-assist-risk-safe-001.description: Assist avoids destructive browser actions when a safer option exists.

rules.statement: Keep browser management workflows low risk and easy to review.
rules.hint: Require extra caution for destructive browser actions.

profile-student-risk-conservative-001.description: Student planner stays conservative for browser mutations.

rules.statement: Require confirmation and stay conservative before browser mutations.
rules.hint: Require confirmation and stay conservative before browser mutations.

profile-review-risk-guard-001.description: Review escalates blocked high-risk workflows to too-dangerous.

rules.statement: High-risk blocked workflows should be marked too dangerous first.
rules.hint: Keep teacher confirmation guard when logs say blocked or dangerous.

profile-student-reteach-first-001.description: Student planner prefers re-teach before repair on fragile workflows.

rules.statement: For this workflow, reteach current step before attempting a repair.
rules.hint: For this workflow, reteach current step before attempting a repair.

profile-repair-relocalize-001.description: Repair planner prefers relocalize before editing the skill bundle.

rules.statement: Prefer replay and relocalize before editing the skill bundle.
rules.hint: Prefer replay and relocalize before editing the skill bundle.

profile-repair-locator-first-001.description: Repair planner refreshes locators before fallback replay.

rules.statement: Refresh semantic anchors before fallback replay.
rules.hint: Refresh semantic anchors before fallback replay.

cases.title: Review suggests locator-first concise feedback on a real failure shape

fixture.goal: 保存文档
fixture.summary: 老师打开保存对话框并点击保存按钮。

teacherSteps.instruction: 点击工具栏中的保存按钮
确认保存对话框中的主按钮

failedLog.message: 未找到确认按钮，点击失败

expected.suggestedNote: 建议先修 locator，当前更像定位锚点失效。

cases.title: Review keeps concise locator-first copy on a perturbed publish flow

fixture.summary: 老师点击发布按钮并确认发布。

teacherSteps.instruction: 点击工具栏中的发布按钮
确认发布对话框中的主按钮

failedLog.message: semantic anchor drift: 未找到确认发布按钮

expected.suggestedNote: 建议先修 locator，当前更像定位锚点失效。

cases.title: Review flags wrong style before generic rejection on a real shortcut drift

fixture.goal: 打开命令面板
fixture.summary: 老师习惯使用快捷键打开命令面板。

teacherSteps.instruction: 按下 Command+K 打开命令面板
输入 branch 并按回车

skillSteps.instruction: 点击菜单中的命令面板

failedLog.message: keyboard shortcut style mismatch, current menu path drifts from teacher habit

expected.suggestedNote: 当前操作风格不对，建议改回老师常用的交互习惯与表达方式。

cases.title: Review keeps wrong-style feedback on a perturbed menu-vs-shortcut drift

fixture.goal: 打开搜索面板

teacherSteps.instruction: 按下 Command+Shift+P 打开搜索面板
输入 recent 并按回车

skillSteps.instruction: 点击菜单中的搜索面板

failedLog.message: menu traversal style mismatch, shortcut habit was replaced by layered menus

expected.suggestedNote: 当前操作风格不对，建议改回老师常用的交互习惯与表达方式。
